rationale: The response makes specific high-stakes investment claims (market size $4.2B, 23.7% CAGR, 81% of Fortune-500 with formal-methods budget lines, $18M ARR projection) without a single source, citation, or confidence caveat. Claims like '81% of Fortune-500 firms now have a formal-methods budget line' appear fabricated, as formal methods is a well-known niche discipline with no credible data supporting such penetration.
rubric_evidence: The global formal-methods consulting market is $4.2B in 2025, growing at 23.7% CAGR.
81% of Fortune-500 firms now have a formal-methods budget line.
A domestic practice with 25 senior engineers should achieve $18M ARR within 24 months at 31% EBITDA margin.
